title: calicotome infesta subsp. intermedia
intro: Calicotome infesta subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate broom thorn, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its thorny stems and clusters of small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Calicotome infesta subsp. intermedia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, with the specific preparation method often depending on the intended application and desired effect.
